full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Initial understanding of the research paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: I have attached the research paper, help me understand the whole paper
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided an overview of the CW-SVM method and its main components before I read the details of the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: After reading the explanation I went back to the paper and checked Sections 2 and 3 to confirm the steps of the method.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: In the CW-SVM paper what does the constraint w_alpha − w_beta ≥ rho actually mean in simple terms?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped interpret the pairwise weight constraint and how it reflects expert feature rankings.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified this explanation by looking at Equation 5 and the surrounding explanation in Section 3.1.2.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the role of box constraints
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Why does the CW-SVM paper add box constraints on feature weights?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Explained that the box constraints prevent the optimization from pushing weights to extreme values.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I confirmed this by checking Equation 3 and the discussion in the experimental setup section.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Simplifying the explanation before writing the answer
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain the constrained weight space SVM method in simple terms
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped me translate the technical description into simpler language that I could use while writing the step-by-step explanation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I rewrote the explanation in my own words and ensured that each step corresponded to the method described in the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I used this structure but wrote the final explanation after reviewing the paper again.
